title: stellina hamulata
intro: Stellina hamulata, also known as the starflower or lesser knapweed, is a perennial herb in the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stellina hamulata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve respiratory problems, and reduce inflammation. Stellina hamulata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
